title: Sass & Belle Tractor Bamboo Spoons - Set of 3
features: This set of three joyful baby spoons are made from 100% planet-friendly bamboo and accompanied by an adorable tractor design.
This item has been hand-polished and crafted from natural bamboo which may cause subtle variations in the colour and engraving, making each one beautifully unique.
